details.original_question: What is the highest eligible free rate for K-12 students in the schools in Alameda County?
details.paraphrase: What is the maximum qualifying free rate for K-12 students in schools located in Alameda County?
details.synonym: What is the maximum qualifying complimentary rate for K-12 learners in the educational institutions within Alameda County?

details.original_question: Please list the lowest three eligible free rates for students aged 5-17 in continuation schools.
details.paraphrase: Could you provide the three lowest qualifying free rates available for students aged 5-17 in continuation schools?
details.synonym: Kindly provide the three least expensive qualifying free rates for learners aged 5-17 in continuation educational institutions.

details.original_question: Please list the zip code of all the charter schools in Fresno County Office of Education.
details.paraphrase: Could you provide the zip codes for all the charter schools under the Fresno County Office of Education?
details.synonym: Kindly provide the postal codes for all the charter schools within the Fresno County Office of Education.

details.original_question: What is the unabbreviated mailing street address of the school with the highest FRPM count for K-12 students?
details.paraphrase: What is the full mailing street address of the school that has the highest number of FRPM students in K-12?
details.synonym: What is the full mailing street address of the institution with the greatest FRPM total for K-12 learners?

details.original_question: Please list the phone numbers of the direct charter-funded schools that are opened after 2000/1/1.
details.paraphrase: Could you provide the phone numbers for the direct charter-funded schools that began operating after January 1, 2000?
details.synonym: Kindly provide the contact numbers of the direct charter-funded schools that commenced operations after January 1, 2000.

details.original_question: How many schools with an average score in Math greater than 400 in the SAT test are exclusively virtual?
details.paraphrase: What is the number of schools that have an average Math SAT score above 400 and operate solely online?
details.synonym: What is the number of educational institutions with a mean score in Mathematics exceeding 400 on the SAT exam that are solely online?

details.original_question: Among the schools with the SAT test takers of over 500, please list the schools that are magnet schools or offer a magnet program.
details.paraphrase: Please provide a list of schools that are either magnet schools or have a magnet program, specifically among those with more than 500 SAT test takers.
details.synonym: Among the institutions with SAT participants exceeding 500, please identify the schools that are magnet institutions or provide a magnet program.

details.original_question: What is the phone number of the school that has the highest number of test takers with an SAT score of over 1500?
details.paraphrase: What is the contact number for the school that has the largest number of students who scored over 1500 on the SAT?
details.synonym: What is the contact number for the institution that has the largest amount of exam participants with an SAT score exceeding 1500?

details.original_question: What is the number of SAT test takers of the schools with the highest FRPM count for K-12 students?
details.paraphrase: How many students took the SAT in the schools that have the highest count of free or reduced-price meal (FRPM) participants for K-12?
details.synonym: What is the quantity of SAT examinees from the institutions with the largest FRPM total for K-12 learners?

details.original_question: Among the schools with the average score in Math over 560 in the SAT test, how many schools are directly charter-funded?
details.paraphrase: How many schools that have an average SAT Math score above 560 are funded directly by charter?
details.synonym: Among the institutions with an average Math score exceeding 560 on the SAT exam, how many are directly funded by charter?

details.original_question: For the school with the highest average score in Reading in the SAT test, what is its FRPM count for students aged 5-17?
details.paraphrase: What is the FRPM count for students aged 5-17 at the school that has the highest average Reading score on the SAT?
details.synonym: For the institution with the greatest mean score in Reading on the SAT examination, what is its count of FRPM students aged 5-17?

details.original_question: Please list the codes of the schools with a total enrollment of over 500.
details.paraphrase: Could you provide the codes for the schools that have an enrollment exceeding 500 students?
details.synonym: Kindly provide the identifiers of the institutions that have an overall enrollment exceeding 500 students.

details.original_question: Among the schools with an SAT excellence rate of over 0.3, what is the highest eligible free rate for students aged 5-17?
details.paraphrase: Which school has the highest qualifying free rate for students aged 5-17 among those with an SAT excellence rate exceeding 0.3?
details.synonym: Among the institutions with an SAT success rate exceeding 0.3, what is the highest qualifying free rate for learners aged 5-17?

details.original_question: Please list the phone numbers of the schools with the top 3 SAT excellence rate.
details.paraphrase: Could you provide the contact numbers for the schools that have the highest SAT excellence rates?
details.synonym: Kindly provide the contact numbers of the institutions that have the highest 3 SAT achievement rates.

details.original_question: List the top five schools, by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the most number of Enrollment (Ages 5-17). Please give their NCES school identification number.
details.paraphrase: Please provide a list of the five schools with the highest enrollment numbers for ages 5-17, arranged from highest to lowest, along with their NCES school identification numbers.
details.synonym: Enumerate the five leading institutions, arranged in decreasing order from the greatest to the least, based on the highest number of enrollments (Ages 5-17). Kindly provide their NCES school identification numbers.

details.original_question: Which active district has the highest average score in Reading?
details.paraphrase: Which active district boasts the highest average score in Reading?
details.synonym: Which engaged district possesses the highest mean score in Reading?

details.original_question: How many schools in merged Alameda have number of test takers less than 100?
details.paraphrase: What is the count of schools in merged Alameda that have fewer than 100 test takers?
details.synonym: What is the count of educational institutions in consolidated Alameda that have fewer than 100 exam participants?

details.original_question: Rank schools by their average score in Writing where the score is greater than 499, showing their charter numbers.
details.paraphrase: List the schools according to their average Writing scores above 499, including their charter numbers.
details.synonym: Order educational institutions based on their mean score in Writing, provided the score exceeds 499, and display their charter identifiers.

details.original_question: How many schools in Fresno (directly funded) have number of test takers not more than 250?
details.paraphrase: What is the number of directly funded schools in Fresno that have 250 or fewer test takers?
details.synonym: What is the count of educational institutions in Fresno (publicly financed) that have a number of exam participants not exceeding 250?

details.original_question: What is the phone number of the school that has the highest average score in Math?
details.paraphrase: What is the contact number for the school with the highest average Math score?
details.synonym: What is the contact number for the institution that possesses the highest mean score in Mathematics?
